summary: Fox News segment built around on-screen graphics under a heading 'Media/Social Media Coverage.' The frame shows screenshots of news and social-media posts, including a Times of India article and a Block Club Chicago post, with a centered graphic reading 'ICE AND CBP: WHERE IS U.S. CITIZEN SUNDAS NAQVI?' A Fox News bug is at lower left. The audio is reporting that questioned an account of an ICE detention. The tweet text says new evidence showed the woman was on a spa getaway.

script.scene: On-screen montage of news and social-media screenshots under heading 'Media/Social Media Coverage'; centered graphic 'WHERE IS U.S. CITIZEN SUNDAS NAQVI?'; Fox News bug.
